title: Crunchy Canadian Rice Flour Pancakes
description: A roasted and juicy post-workout Canadian dish featuring rice flour pancakes, this recipe is ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly and perfect for a healthy breakfast, the rice flour provides a crunchy texture while the maple syrup adds a touch of sweetness
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the rice flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the water, eggs, and maple syrup.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and brush with coconut oil.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot and enjoy.
